query:
ALTER TABLE enrollments 
ADD COLUMN dateOfBirth VARCHAR(10) AFTER beltAchievedDate,
ADD COLUMN totalXP INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER dateOfBirth,
ADD COLUMN currentStreak INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER totalXP,
ADD COLUMN longestStreak INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER currentStreak,
ADD COLUMN lastCheckInDate VARCHAR(10) AFTER longestStreak,
ADD COLUMN photoUrl TEXT AFTER lastCheckInDate;
